# ZShield

> Sign in with Zcash. Privacy-first identity for the web — no password, no email, no KYC.

ZShield is an OIDC identity provider that turns any Zcash address into a W3C DID (did:zcash) and issues standard JWT tokens. Built for the ZecHub Hackathon 2026.

Live demo: https://zshield.vercel.app
Source code: https://github.com/EdCryptoFi/zshield
Built by: Ed (@EdCriptoFi) — https://x.com/EdCriptoFi

## What ZShield does

- Generates an Ed25519 keypair in the browser (ZIP 304 stand-in for demo)
- Encodes the public key as a bech32m address with `zauth1` prefix
- Creates a W3C DID v1.1 document (`did:zcash:mainnet:<address>`)
- Issues a random nonce; the wallet signs it (challenge-response)
- Verifies the signature and issues a signed JWT with ZK claims
- Exposes standard OIDC endpoints so any OAuth2 app can integrate

## OIDC Endpoints

- GET  /.well-known/openid-configuration — discovery document
- POST /api/challenge                    — issue signing nonce
- POST /api/verify                       — verify signature, issue JWT
- POST /api/oidc/token                   — token exchange
- GET  /api/oidc/userinfo                — address + DID + ZK claims
- GET  /api/oidc/jwks                    — JWK Set for JWT validation

## Zero-Knowledge Claims

| Claim          | Proves           | Hides               |
|----------------|------------------|---------------------|
| zec_holder     | Holds ≥ 1 ZEC    | Exact balance       |
| active_user    | Transacted ≤ 30d | Transaction details |
| senior_holder  | Holds ≥ 10 ZEC   | Exact balance       |

## Tech Stack

- Framework: Next.js 16 App Router (TypeScript)
- Auth: NextAuth v5 beta (Credentials provider)
- Crypto: @noble/ed25519 (ZIP 304 stand-in)
- Identity: W3C DID v1.1 · did:zcash method
- OIDC: Custom bridge (discovery, token, userinfo, JWKS)
- Token: jose (EdDSA / HS256)
- Address: bech32m (zauth1 prefix — demo)
- Deploy: Vercel

## Privacy Policy

ZShield uses only essential session cookies (HttpOnly, Secure) for authentication.
No tracking cookies. No analytics. No third-party data collection.
Private keys are generated and stay in the browser — they are never transmitted.

## Hackathon

ZecHub Hackathon 2026 · Track: Zcash Login · Prize pool: 25 ZEC
Deadline: 2026-07-15
